linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: PORTING. Scoped libcudf core now 107 TUs (fork 5be894c, real gfx90a code object); GPU 8/8 on MI250X (4 wave64 null-mask + 2 tuple-key radix + 2 NEW cuco-backed: DistinctCucoStaticSet, ApplyBooleanMask). HEADLINE: the cudf-INTERNAL type-erased dispatch link-closure COLLAPSED from ~209 undefined symbols (at the 83-TU core) to EXACTLY 1 -- the only remaining cudf-internal undefined symbol is cudf::detail::binary_operation(column,scalar), the jitify->hipRTC binaryop JIT path (next phase). Verified by nm -D -u libcudf.so | c++filt | grep 'U cudf'; the prior-flagged deferred symbols (match_dictionaries, build_lists_child_column_recursive, preprocessed_table::create) are all DEFINED now. Closure was closed by bringing up ~24 modules: table row_operators+primitive_row_operators (experimental::row machinery), stream_compaction distinct/apply_boolean_mask/distinct_helpers/stable_distinct (cuco static_set+retrieve_all via the refreshed cuco dep 47ae24d hip_device_select.cuh), full hashing set, search contains_column/table, structs/lists utilities + lists dremel + scatter_helper + dictionary set_keys + transform encode. Reusable cuco-bringup fixes (in 5be894c): cuco_allocator stream-aware adaptor (CCCL 2-arg allocate vs rmm 1-arg), modern mixed_multimap_type spelling. NEXT WALL (hard, characterized + REVERTED an attempt): reductions + aggregation do NOT fit a single libcudf.so -- each rocPRIM reduce_impl TU is 200-234 MB (~190 MB device fatbin from the full type x op matrix); 15 reductions push cudf.dir to 2.5 GB and the host image past the +/-2 GiB x86-64 relocation reach. Three escalating overflow classes: PC32 (.text->.rodata.str) is fixed by -mcmodel=large on the HIP host pass (relink PASSED), but that then EXPOSES R_X86_64_TLSGD/TLSLD/__tls_get_addr (thread_local in stream_pool.cpp+host_memory.cpp) AND .eh_frame PC-offset overflow in column.cu -- neither covered by the large code model. FIX is structural: split libcudf into multiple .so, or cap the per-TU device fatbin. join/groupby will hit the same ceiling. The 107-TU core links FINE without -mcmodel=large (libcudf.so ~408 MB, under 2 GiB) and is the validated pushed baseline. Then the JIT phase (jitify_hiprtc_plan.md). src/io (nvCOMP/KvikIO) stays scoped out. See notes.md + PORTING_GUIDE.
